mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RECO_POLICY ( policy_id, version, policy_type_code_value_id, policy_key, policy_value, effective_from, effective_to, status, approved_at, approved_by, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( #{policyId}, #{version}, #{policyTypeCodeValueId}, #{policyKey}, #{policyValue}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{status}, #{approvedAt}, #{approvedBy}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM RECO_POLICY WHERE version = #{version} ORDER BY policy_id DESC
SELECT * FROM RECO_POLICY ORDER BY created_at DESC, policy_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM RECO_POLICY WHERE is_active = 'Y' AND status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY approved_at DESC, policy_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM RECO_POLICY ORDER BY created_at DESC, policy_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE RECO_POLICY SET is_active = 'N' WHERE is_active = 'Y'
